arts.ttl: Salah set to snub Saudi: Liverpool optimism grows despite Trent exit
arts.sum: Liverpool are growing increasingly optimistic that Mohamed Salah will extend his contract, according to a report. Salah set to snub Saudi: Liverpool optimism grows despite Trent exit

arts.ttl: Liverpool Optimistic Salah Will Sign Deal Amid Alexander-Arnold Blow
arts.sum: Liverpool are increasingly confident that Mohamed Salah will pen an extended contract instead of leaving as a free agent

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's dream Liverpool XI as Mo Salah stays and five big-money signings planned
arts.sum: Liverpool look set to win the Premier League title this season but there could be some stunning signings in the pipeline at Anfield this summer as the Reds aim to keep a hold of their out-of-contract stars

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Reds should 'bend rules' to keep Mo Salah as teammate decides on future
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot will be hoping to get his side's Premier League title bid back on track after the international break, with the Reds closing in on a famous triumph after going 15 points clear at the top of the table

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah to issue official update in exactly one week as Liverpool superstar set for £25m payday
Salah or Ronaldo in your all-time Premier League XI? VOTE HERE
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah or Cristiano Ronaldo? Who would you pick to play on the right wing of your all-time Premier League XI?

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher comes up with new Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk theory as contracts run down
arts.sum: Liverpool lost two important games in the space of four days as the Reds' Carabao Cup final defeat to Newcastle followed their exit from the Champions League at the hands of PSG

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'going to have to bend the rules' to ensure Mo Salah stays at Anfield
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is set to leave Liverpool this summer unless he signs a new contract with the Premier League giants, but Michael Owen spelled out a potential scenario for the Egyptian to remain a Red

arts.ttl: Liverpool told to swap Mo Salah and Darwin Nunez for two Premier League stars
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah and Darwin Nunez both face uncertain futures at Liverpool and one of the club's former frontmen has picked out a pair of potential replacements for the duo

arts.ttl: Preview: Egypt vs. Sierra Leone - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's World Cup Qualifying - Africa clash between Egypt and Sierra Leone, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
